outputs.description: A generic status message, either success or some form of an error notice. IPQualityScore.Url.success Was the request successful?
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.message

outputs.description: Is this domain suspected of being unsafe due to phishing, malware, spamming, or abusive behavior? View the confidence level by analyzing the "risk_score". IPQualityScore.Url.domain Domain name of the final destination URL of the scanned link, after following all redirects.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.unsafe

outputs.description: The IP address corresponding to the server of the domain name. IPQualityScore.Url.server The server banner of the domain's IP address. For example: "nginx/1.16.0". Value will be "N/A" if unavailable.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.ip_address

outputs.description: MIME type of URL's content. For example "text/html; charset=UTF-8". Value will be "N/A" if unavailable. IPQualityScore.Url.status_code HTTP Status Code of the URL's response. This value should be "200" for a valid website. Value is "0" if URL is unreachable.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.content_type

outputs.description: Total number of bytes to download the URL's content. Value is "0" if URL is unreachable. IPQualityScore.Url.domain_rank Estimated popularity rank of website globally. Value is "0" if the domain is unranked or has low traffic.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.page_size

outputs.description: The domain of the URL has valid DNS records. IPQualityScore.Url.parking Is the domain of this URL currently parked with a for sale notice?
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.dns_valid

outputs.description: Is the domain of this URL associated with email SPAM or abusive email addresses? IPQualityScore.Url.malware Is this URL associated with malware or viruses?
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.spamming

outputs.description: Is this URL associated with malicious phishing behavior? IPQualityScore.Url.suspicious Is this URL suspected of being malicious or used for phishing or abuse? Use in conjunction with the "risk_score" as a confidence level.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.phishing

outputs.description: The IPQS risk score which estimates the confidence level for malicious URL detection. Risk Scores 85+ are high risk, while Risk Scores = 100 are confirmed as accurate. IPQualityScore.Url.request_id A unique identifier for this request that can be used to lookup the request details or send a postback conversion notice.
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.risk_score

outputs.description: The URL being queried. IPQualityScore.Url.adult Is this URL or domain hosting dating or adult content?
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.url

outputs.description: Date A human description of when this domain was registered. (Ex: 3 months ago) IPQualityScore.Url.domain_age.timestamp
outputs.name: IPQualityScore.Url.domain_age.human

outputs.description: The unix time since epoch when this domain was first registered. (Ex: 1568061634) IPQualityScore.Url.domain_age.iso Date
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Score
outputs.name: The time this domain was registered in ISO8601 format (Ex: 2019-09-09T16:40:34-04:00)

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. URL.Data The URL
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: The vendor reporting the URL as malicious.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor
